== Notes for [[Item:Q88551|Q88551]] ==

Caius Julius Julus was the son of Caius Julius Julus, who was the son ofLucius Julius Julus, who was the son of Numerius Julius Julus. There isthen another gap of about 560 years separating him from Julus, who wasthe son of Ascanius, who was the son of Aeneas, famous hero of The Iliadand The Aenead.

CONSUL WITH Q. FABIUS; ONE OF THE DECEMVIRI FOR MAKING LAWS

LUCIUS SCRIBONIUS (L) LIBO

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940C626A41EFBBE49822EF79916CB25C
geni:6000000003828283398

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
